ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article (e.g., cbs) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the article (e.g., Politics, Sports, Technology) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the article */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status of the article (e.g., Draft, Published, Archived) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the article */,
  "ratings" INTEGER /* User ratings for the article */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL of the article's thumbnail image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the video belongs to */,
  "video_title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "video_text" TEXT /* Text description of the video */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the video has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the video */,
  "ratings" INTEGER /* User ratings for the video */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL of the video's thumbnail image */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the video (e.g., News, Entertainment, Sports) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_videos_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_videos_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
column_names: Category of the article (e.g., Politics, Sports, Technology)
Publication status of the article (e.g., Draft, Published, Archived)
Number of views the article has received
Number of comments on the article
URL of the article's thumbnail image
ID of the article the video belongs to
Duration of the video in seconds
Number of views the video has received
Number of comments on the video
URL of the video's thumbnail image
Category of the video (e.g., News, Entertainment, Sports)
